```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  rcases not_forall.mp hŌá with ‚ü®h, hne‚ü©
  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)
  have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    calc
      (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S
          = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by rfl
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
            simp [S, Finset.mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g hg
            simp [map_mul]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            exact Finset.sum_bijective (fun g : G => h * g) (by intro g; simp)
      _ = S := by rfl
  have hŌáh_ne_one : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) ‚Č† 1 := by
    intro hh1
    apply hne
    ext g
    calc
      Ōá g = Ōá (h * (h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g)) := by simp [mul_assoc]
      _ = Ōá h * Ōá (h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g) := by simp [map_mul]
      _ = (1 : ‚Ąā) * Ōá (h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g) := by simpa [hh1]
      _ = Ōá (h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g) := by simp
      _ = Ōá h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * Ōá g := by simp [map_mul, mul_assoc]
      _ = ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ) * Ōá g := by simpa using congrArg (fun z : ‚Ąā => z‚ĀĽ¬Ļ) hh1
      _ = Ōá g := by simp [hh1]
  have hzero : S = 0 := by
    apply mul_eq_zero.mp
    have : ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) - 1) * S = 0 := by
      linarith [hmul]
    exact this
  simpa [S] using hzero
```
